description: Creates a horizontal number line for visualizing inequalities, intervals, and points
utility: Foundation container for number line visualizations with customizable position, dimensions, and range

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Logical position using at(row, col) for placement on canvas

arguments.name: height
arguments.description: Height of the number line in grid units

arguments.name: width
arguments.description: Width of the number line in grid units

arguments.name: range
arguments.type: range(min, max) or range(min, max, step)
arguments.description: Optional range specification. Defaults to range(0, 10)

arguments.name: grid
arguments.description: Optional grid() to enable tick marks and labels on the number line

alternates.description: Create number line with default range [0, 10]

alternates.syntax: nl(at(row, col), height, width, range(min, max))
alternates.description: Specify custom minimum and maximum values

alternates.syntax: nl(at(row, col), height, width, range(min, max, step))
alternates.description: Include step size for tick spacing

alternates.syntax: nl(at(row, col), height, width, range(min, max), grid())

examples.scenario: Number line from -5 to 5 with ticks
